title: Curriculum Vitae
content:
# Milad Natanzi

**Department of Electrical & Computer Engineering**
Worcester Polytechnic Institute (WPI)
Atwater Kent Laboratories
100 Institute Road, Worcester, MA 01609

**Email:** snatanzi@wpi.edu
**Links:** [Google Scholar Profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=P7cClxAAAAAJ&hl=en) | [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/miladnatanzi) | [WPI Profile](https://www.wpi.edu/people/doctoral-student/snatanzi) | [www.natanzi.com](https://www.natanzi.com)

- - -

## Research Interests

* **Next-G Wireless Networks:** O-RAN architecture, 5G/6G architectures, and NG-RAN.
* **AI/ML for Communications:** AI/ML-driven network optimization, LLM integration for 6G networks, and massive MIMO.
* **Wireless Security:** LLM vulnerabilities in network control, security of space and satellite systems, and vulnerability assessment of traffic steering algorithms.
* **Open RAN (O-RAN):** Intelligent control, xApp development, and performance analysis using OAIC/OAIC-T frameworks.

- - -

* **Ph.D. Candidate, Electrical & Computer Engineering**

* **M.S., Information Technology - Computer Networks**
  *Pardis IAU* | 2014 – 2017

  * Research: Software-Defined Networking (SDN) security and architecture
  * GPA: 3.8/4.0
